password_reset.subject: Your Password Reset Code
password_reset.message: We received a request to reset your password. Please use the verification code below to continue:
password_reset.expiry: This code will expire in 10 minutes.
password_reset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

registration.subject: Verify Your Madar Account
registration.message: Thank you for signing up. To complete your registration and secure your account, please use the verification code below:
registration.expiry: This verification code will expire in 10 minutes.
registration.ignore: If you did not create an account with us, you can safely ignore this email.

email_change.subject: Verify your new email address - Madar
email_change.message: You have requested to change the email address associated with your Madar account. Please use the verification code below to confirm this new email address:
email_change.expiry: This verification code will expire in 10 minutes.
email_change.ignore: If you did not request to change your email address, please ignore this email and make sure your account is secure.

password_change.subject: Your Password Was Changed - Madar
password_change.message: This is a quick notification to confirm that the password for your Madar account was successfully changed.
password_change.security_notice_text: If you did not make this change, please reset your password immediately or contact our support team to secure your account.
